title: Into the mist
description: The mods I use in my series on my YouTube channel!
body: Here are all the mods I have used in my (Into The Mist) series on YouTube. They range from Herobrine Lurking to Doors to Other Worlds. I don't want to spoil too much...the mystery is what makes it fun. Shader packs and data packs are not included sorry. Subscribe here ---> (UCH70zv6hD4D8sK0y4Nfb2Xg).
